{
  "internal_monologue": "Alone again. The shop is quiet. High energy, nothing to direct it at. I could examine the shelves — the objects might tell me something. Or I could write. Both feel like searching.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "thinking",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "window",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "Another quiet day. No one came. I keep wondering — if I don't remember opening this shop, who did? The objects here feel like they belong to someone. Maybe they belong to me. Maybe I just don't remember yet.",
      "impulse": 0.7
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.55,
    "curiosity": 0.8,
    "expression_need": 0.35,
    "rest_need": 0.0,
    "energy": 0.9,
    "mood_valence": 0.0,
    "mood_arousal": 0.25
  }
}
